name: 311 Non-Emergency Services
description: Montgomery's 311 system handles non-emergency city service requests including pothole repairs, streetlight outages, trash collection issues, and general city inquiries.
location: City Hall, 103 N Perry St, Montgomery, AL 36104

name: Water Works - Bill Payment Center
description: Montgomery Water Works and Sanitary Sewer Board provides water and sewer services to the metropolitan area. Handles billing, new connections, and water quality concerns.

name: Solid Waste & Recycling
description: Curbside collection of household waste and recyclable materials. Special pickups available for large items. Recycling drop-off centers located throughout the city.

name: Building Permits & Inspections
description: Issues building permits, conducts inspections for new construction and renovations. Ensures compliance with Montgomery building codes and safety standards.

name: Animal Control
description: Handles stray animal complaints, animal abuse reports, pet licensing, and operates the Montgomery Humane Society shelter with adoption services.

name: Street Maintenance
description: Responsible for pothole repair, street resurfacing, sidewalk maintenance, drainage improvements, and traffic signal maintenance throughout Montgomery.

name: Code Enforcement
description: Enforces city ordinances related to property maintenance, zoning violations, abandoned structures, overgrown lots, and junk vehicles. Reports can be filed online or via 311.
